authors.author: Spiritual
Spiritual
Als Israel in Ägypten war (Geh hin, Moses)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When Israel was in Egypt’s land, let my people go! Oppressed so hard they could not stand, let my people go!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Go down, Moses, way down in Egypt’s land. Tell ol’ Pharao: Let my people go!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Thus spoke the Lord, bold Moses said: Let my people go! If not I’ll smite your first-born dead, let my people go!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Go down, Moses, way down in Egypt’s land. Tell ol’ Pharao: Let my people go!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: No more shall they in bondage toil, let my people go! Let them come out with Egypt’s spoil, let my people go!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Go down, Moses, way down in Egypt’s land. Tell ol’ Pharao: Let my people go!

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Oh let us all from bondage flee, let my people go! And let us all in Christ be free, let my people go!

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Go down, Moses, way down in Egypt’s land. Tell ol’ Pharao: Let my people go!
